testcase.name: Expense Entry Flow › should create expense entry with vendor info
testcase.failure:
[e2e-tests] › e2e-tests\expense-entry-flow.spec.ts:12:7 › Expense Entry Flow › should create expense entry with vendor info
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByTestId('expense-success-alert') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByTestId('expense-success-alert')
35 | // Use data-testid for success alert 36 | const successAlert = page.getByTestId('expense-success-alert'); > 37 | await expect(successAlert).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 38 | 39 | await page.goto('/accounting/history'); 40 | // Đảm bảo định dạng số tiền đúng chuẩn vi-VN (dấu chấm phân cách hàng nghìn) at C:\VibeCoding\Gemini_Windsurf\6_Testing\e2e-tests\expense-entry-flow.spec.ts:37:32
